strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Demonstrated builder mindset: founded an open-source geo-data platform and actively shares knowledge through talks and workshops
concerns: Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, with no evidence of director-level scope, org-wide technical strategy, or influence on product direction
AI experience is recent (2025) and tooling-focused; no recognized AI expertise, published work, or AI-powered products built at scale
No cloud platform strategy background or experience advising strategic customers/partners, which is core to this role

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC expectations
Limited depth and track record in AI
Breadth of engineering experience meeting the 15-year bar

response.justification: The candidate clears the minimum bar on years of experience and technical breadth, and shows entrepreneurial energy through GISCollective and community teaching. However, this role is a director-level strategy position centered on recognized AI expertise, cloud platform vision, and advising strategic customers. The resume reflects a strong senior/staff implementation engineer whose AI exposure began recently and stays at the tooling level, with no evidence of setting technical strategy, leading through influence at scale, or shipping notable AI products. The gap between the candidate's current level and the role's expectations is substantial.
